---
title: "sciRplot"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(pixture)

scirplot <- read.csv("files/sciRplot.csv")
title <- scirplot$title
paths <- paste("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ZhengTiger/PlotOnePiece/refs/heads/main/images/sciRplot/", scirplot$image, sep="")
link <- scirplot$link
captions <- paste0(
  "<div style='line-height:0.1;'>",
  paste0("<div style='font-size:0.8rem;margin-bottom:0.0rem;line-height:0.5;color:#34495e;'><b>", title, "</b></div>"),
  "</div>"
)
```

## 折线图

```{r}
#| echo: false

pixgallery(
  path = paths,
  caption = captions,
  caption_valign = "below",
  caption_halign = "center",
  link = link,
  h = "120px",
  w = "150px", 
  border_radius = "10px",
  gap = "10px",
  layout = "fixed"
)
```
